# Anish Rajbanshi Portfolio

Canonical URL: https://anishrajbanshi.com.np/
Last updated: 2026-07-09

Anish Rajbanshi is a BSc (Hons) Computing student at Lincoln International College in Nepal. His portfolio focuses on cybersecurity, networking, Linux, artificial intelligence, web development, and hands-on software projects.

## Key Sections

- About: background, academic focus, current availability, and learning philosophy.
- Education: BSc (Hons) Computing at Lincoln International College, Nepal.
- Skills: cybersecurity, networking, operating systems, programming, and web development.
- Projects: Cisco Packet Tracer network, Linux architecture study, OS scheduling, Wireshark traffic analysis, Python university management system, and Tic-Tac-Toe with minimax AI.
- Contact: email, LinkedIn, GitHub, Instagram, and Kathmandu, Nepal location.

## Short Answers

Who is Anish Rajbanshi?
Anish Rajbanshi is a BSc (Hons) Computing student in Nepal focused on cybersecurity, networking, Linux, AI, and web development.

What is Anish Rajbanshi learning?
He is learning cybersecurity, networking, Linux administration, artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and web development.

Is Anish Rajbanshi open to internships?
Yes. He is open to internships, collaborations, and conversations about cybersecurity, networking, AI, and software development.
